notes: Basic structure exists but barrel physics are erratic (random ladder descent, poor platform detection), player grounding is unreliable on sloped platforms, visuals are primitive colored rectangles with no real DK aesthetic, and the overall game feel is rough and barely playable.
Barrels roll UP the slopes instead of down, and releasing movement keys while on a ladder causes the player to plummet to their death.

It runs and has basic movement, climbing, barrels, hammers, scoring, and lives, but the stage layout and progression are very incomplete versus Donkey Kong and several mechanics/physics feel inaccurate and rough.
